situation.title: Situation Descriptions
situation.financial_situation_placeholder: Describe your current financial situation, including assets, liabilities, and any outstanding debt.
situation.employment_circumstances_placeholder: Provide details of your current employment status, job security, or reasons for unemployment.
situation.reason_for_applying_placeholder: Explain why you are seeking support and how this assistance will help resolve your challenges.

ai_suggestion.title: Help me write
ai_suggestion.timeout_error: The writing suggestion took too long. Please try again.
ai_suggestion.generic_error: We could not generate a suggestion right now. Please try again in a moment.

demo_autofill.title: Demo Autofill Helper
demo_autofill.description: Select a mock user profile to instantly autofill the <1>Personal</1> and <2>Family & Financial</2> steps. The <3>Situation</3> step is left blank for testing the AI generator.

success.title: Application Completed!
success.subtitle: Your application has been received. A copy of your details has been saved locally for persistence. You can review the details below:
